title: anthurium unguiense
intro: Anthurium unguiense, also known as the 'Guayaquil Antherium' or 'Red Anthurium', is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. The plant is known for its heart-shaped, long-lasting flowers that range in color from red to pink and white. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and the plant is also used in traditional folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain.
